output:
I’m checking the available test and lint commands in this repo, then I’ll run the automated checks for story `21-1-extract-workflow-actors` and report the result.I found `npm run lint`, `npm run test:unit`, and `npm test` in `package.json`. I’m running those checks now; there are already local modifications in the worktree, so I’m treating this as verification only and not changing files.The checks are in progress. `eslint` started cleanly, `bats` has begun passing integration cases, and `vitest` is running the full unit suite.`eslint` completed with warnings only, not errors. The integration suite is failing in the coverage/doc-health command tests, while the unit suite is still running and needs a final summary.<verdict>fail</verdict>

I ran the requested checks for story `21-1-extract-workflow-actors`.

`npm run lint` exited `0`, but reported `45` warnings. The most relevant one for this story area is in [src/lib/workflow-machine.ts](/Users/ivintik/dev/personal/codeharness/src/lib/workflow-machine.ts). There were no lint errors.

The test suite failed:
- `npm run test:unit` exited `1`.
- `190` test files ran: `187` passed, `3` failed.
- The failing suites were `__tests__/cli.test.ts`, `commands/__tests__/run-parallel.test.ts`, and `commands/__tests__/run.test.ts`.
- Root cause: a parse error in [src/commands/run.ts:217](/Users/ivintik/dev/personal/codeharness/src/commands/run.ts#L217): `Missing initializer in const declaration`.

`npm test` also exited `1`.
- `47` Bats integration tests ran.
- `29` passed, `18` failed.
- Failures are concentrated in `coverage_gate.bats` and `doc_health.bats`, where `codeharness coverage ...` and `codeharness doc-health ...` help/JSON output did not match expectations and several JSON parses failed with `Unexpected end of JSON input`.

Overall verdict is `fail` because both unit and integration test suites are currently failing.
